_comment: Typical PlanAmendmentRequest: minor severity + schema_drift trigger.
proposed_delta: Tighten the `task_status` enum to drop the deprecated `pending_review` literal.
rationale: Wire payloads observed since 2026-04-01 no longer carry pending_review; the literal is dead.

recommended_paths.tradeoff: Breaks any consumer still emitting the dead literal; no such consumers observed.
